data.title: Nebius AI Cloud 3.5 Introduces Serverless AI to Give Developers Frictionless Compute for Real-World AI
data.description: In Amsterdam, Nebius has introduced Nebius AI Cloud 3.5, enhancing its comprehensive cloud platform. This release includes new features aimed at streamlining operations and enhancing the speed of prototyping, testing, and product deployment for AI developers. With the addition of serverless capabilities, developers can initiate workloads promptly without the extensive task of setting up infrastructure beforehand. This advancement allows AI teams to expedite their experiments, model training, and deployment processes.

data.title: Gray and Valvoline Chart the Path Forward for Liquid-Cooled Data Centers
data.description: In response to the increasing need for high-density computing infrastructure, a new partnership has been formed between Gray and Valvoline Global. This collaboration combines Gray's expertise in integrated design-build services with Valvoline Global's knowledge in thermal fluid to address this demand. The partnership, announced in Lexington, Ky., on March 26, 2026, aims to assist data center owners in navigating the challenges of this evolving industry. The joint effort is expected to bring solutions to a wide range of clients facing the demand for robust computing infrastructure.

data.title: Dickey’s Easter Special: $10 Off Catering Packs
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey's Barbecue Pit is offering a special deal on their catering services to make Easter celebrations hassle-free. Until April 6, customers can get $10 off their group pack orders by using the code EASTER10 online, in-store, or on the Dickey's mobile app. This discount allows guests to avoid holiday crowds and focus on quality time with family and friends. With a variety of pack options available, Dickey's is ready to cater for Easter gatherings. The promotion is available for orders placed before the deadline, and Dickey's locations will be open for business as usual on Easter.

data.title: Check Engine Light Questions Addressed In HelloNation Featuring Automotive Expert Devon Reed
data.description: In Woodland, Washington on March 26, 2026, a recent publication discusses the implications of the check engine light illuminating while driving. The article delves into the various factors contributing to this issue, emphasizing the importance of safety measures and the utilization of diagnostic scans to pinpoint and address potential vehicle problems. This informational piece provides insights on how drivers should interpret and respond to such a warning, underscoring the significance of timely maintenance.

data.title: Tevogen Advances Strategic CRO Evaluation to Expand Clinical Research Delivery Capabilities and Drive Revenue Growth
data.description: Tevogen has progressed its evaluation of contract research organizations (CRO) to fuel revenue growth of over $20 million. This move aims to enhance its global clinical capacities and back a sustainable, cash-flow-centric business approach.

data.title: Transgene to Deliver an Oral Presentation on its Individualized Neoantigen Therapeutic Vaccine TG4050 at the World Vaccine Congress
data.description: Transgene will be presenting information about its personalized neoantigen therapeutic vaccine, TG4050, at the upcoming World Vaccine Congress. This oral presentation will focus on the innovative features of TG4050, aiming to provide detailed insights on its efficacy and potential impact. The presentation is scheduled to be delivered by Transgene representatives and is expected to attract a significant audience. This event serves as an important platform for Transgene to showcase TG4050's unique benefits and advancements in the field of individualized neoantigen therapies.

data.title: UNIVERSAL MUSIC GROUP BOARD PUBLISHES 2025 ANNUAL REPORT AND AGENDA FOR 2026 ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING OF SHAREHOLDERS
data.description: Universal Music Group N.V. announced the release of its 2025 annual report and the schedule for the 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders on May 13, 2026, commencing at 2:00 p.m. in Hilversum, The Netherlands. The Company, commonly referred to as UMG, provided insights into its financial performance and strategic plans for the upcoming year. Mark your calendars for this significant event in which key stakeholders will convene to discuss the company's progress and future trajectory.

data.title: Gradient Toxicologist Dr. Cassandra J. Meakin Receives Society of Toxicology Award
data.description: Toxicologist Dr. Cassandra J. Meakin has been honored with the Early Career Achievement Award by the Medical Device and Combination Products Specialty Section of the Society of Toxicology in Boston on March 26, 2026. This recognition comes as Dr. Meakin's exceptional contributions to toxicology and related fields have stood out among peers. This prestigious award acknowledges her remarkable work and dedication in the field.
